name: Avocado-Papaya Salad
recipeInstructions:
Honey Mustard Dressing:
1. Combine 2/3 cup vegetable oil, 1/3 cup cider vinegar, 1 tsp salt, 1/4 tsp pepper, 1/4 cup honey, and 2 tbsp Dijon-style mustard in a closed jar.
Salad:
1. Peel and slice the papayas and avocados.
2. Dip or sprinkle the fruit slices with lemon juice.
3. Arrange on lettuce-lined salad plates.
4. Drizzle dressing over the fruit.
5. Sprinkle with toasted sliced almonds.
